column1: (COPY AND PASTE IN YOUR CSV FILE)
Risk ID – Simple unique identifier for the risk (for example
Asset ID – ID of the asset affected by this risk (referencing the asset inventory).
Asset Name – Name of the asset affected
Threat Scenario – Short label for the risk scenario (for example
Description – Brief description (1–3 sentences) of what could happen and how it would affect the business.
Likelihood (L/M/H) – Estimated likelihood of this scenario occurring in the next 1–2 years: Low / Medium / High.
Impact (L/M/H) – Estimated business impact if the scenario happens: Low / Medium / High.
Overall Priority (L/M/H) – Overall priority for action based on likelihood and impact: Low / Medium / High.
Existing Controls – Key controls that already reduce this risk (for example
Planned Controls – Additional controls or improvements you plan to implement (often mapped to specific 3-practical-controls/ documents).
Owner/Responsible – Role or person responsible for driving the risk treatment actions.
Target Completion Date – Target date to complete the main planned controls.
Status – Current status of this risk treatment (for example
column2: Not started / In progress / Completed / Deferred).

column1: Notes – Any extra comments or context.
